1xx.description: Informational responses. The request was received and the process is continuing.

codes.name: Continue
codes.description: The server has received the request headers and the client should continue with the request.

codes.name: Switching Protocols
codes.description: The server is switching protocols as requested by the client.

codes.name: Processing
codes.description: The server has received and is processing the request, but no response is available yet.

codes.name: Early Hints
codes.description: The server is sending preliminary headers before the final response.

2xx.description: Successful responses. The request was successfully received, understood, and accepted.

codes.name: OK
codes.description: The request succeeded.

codes.name: Created
codes.description: The request succeeded and a new resource was created.

codes.name: Accepted
codes.description: The request has been accepted for processing but has not been completed yet.

codes.name: Non-Authoritative Information
codes.description: The response contains modified information from a third-party source.

codes.name: No Content
codes.description: The request succeeded but there is no content to return.

codes.name: Reset Content
codes.description: The client should reset the document or view that sent the request.

codes.name: Partial Content
codes.description: The server is returning only part of the requested resource.

codes.name: Multi-Status
codes.description: The response contains multiple status results, usually for WebDAV operations.

codes.name: Already Reported
codes.description: The members of a WebDAV binding have already been reported.

codes.name: IM Used
codes.description: The server has fulfilled the request using instance manipulations.

3xx.description: Redirection messages. Further action is needed to complete the request.

codes.name: Multiple Choices
codes.description: There are multiple possible responses and the client should choose one.

codes.name: Moved Permanently
codes.description: The requested resource has been permanently moved to a new URL.

codes.name: Found
codes.description: The requested resource is temporarily located at a different URL.

codes.name: See Other
codes.description: The client should retrieve the resource from another URL using GET.

codes.name: Not Modified
codes.description: The cached version of the resource is still valid.

codes.name: Use Proxy
codes.description: The requested resource must be accessed through a proxy.

codes.name: Unused
codes.description: This status code is no longer used and is reserved.

codes.name: Temporary Redirect
codes.description: The resource is temporarily available at another URL and the method must not change.

codes.name: Permanent Redirect
codes.description: The resource has permanently moved and the method must not change.

4xx.description: Client error responses. The request contains an error or cannot be completed by the client.

codes.name: Bad Request
codes.description: The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

codes.name: Unauthorized
codes.description: Authentication is required or has failed.

codes.name: Payment Required
codes.description: Reserved for future use, originally intended for digital payments.

codes.name: Forbidden
codes.description: The client does not have permission to access the resource.

codes.name: Not Found
codes.description: The requested resource could not be found.

codes.name: Method Not Allowed
codes.description: The HTTP method is not supported for this resource.

codes.name: Not Acceptable
codes.description: The server cannot produce a response matching the client's accepted formats.

codes.name: Proxy Authentication Required
codes.description: Authentication with a proxy is required.

codes.name: Request Timeout
codes.description: The server timed out waiting for the request.

codes.name: Conflict
codes.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

codes.name: Gone
codes.description: The requested resource is no longer available and will not be available again.

codes.name: Length Required
codes.description: The request must include a valid Content-Length header.

codes.name: Precondition Failed
codes.description: A condition in the request headers was not met.

codes.name: Payload Too Large
codes.description: The request body is larger than the server is willing or able to process.

codes.name: URI Too Long
codes.description: The requested URI is too long for the server to process.

codes.name: Unsupported Media Type
codes.description: The media type of the request is not supported by the server.

codes.name: Range Not Satisfiable
codes.description: The requested range cannot be fulfilled.

codes.name: Expectation Failed
codes.description: The server cannot meet the expectation given in the request headers.

codes.name: I'm a teapot
codes.description: An April Fools' joke status code indicating the server refuses to brew coffee because it is a teapot.

codes.name: Misdirected Request
codes.description: The request was sent to a server that cannot produce a response for it.

codes.name: Unprocessable Content
codes.description: The request was well-formed but could not be processed semantically.

codes.name: Locked
codes.description: The requested resource is locked.

codes.name: Failed Dependency
codes.description: The request failed because it depended on another request that failed.

codes.name: Too Early
codes.description: The server is unwilling to risk processing a request that might be replayed.

codes.name: Upgrade Required
codes.description: The client should switch to a different protocol.

codes.name: Precondition Required
codes.description: The server requires the request to be conditional.

codes.name: Too Many Requests
codes.description: The client has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

codes.name: Request Header Fields Too Large
codes.description: The request headers are too large for the server to process.

codes.name: Unavailable For Legal Reasons
codes.description: The resource is unavailable due to legal reasons.

5xx.description: Server error responses. The server failed to fulfill a valid request.

codes.name: Internal Server Error
codes.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition.

codes.name: Not Implemented
codes.description: The server does not support the functionality required to fulfill the request.

codes.name: Bad Gateway
codes.description: The server received an invalid response from an upstream server.

codes.name: Service Unavailable
codes.description: The server is currently unavailable, usually due to overload or maintenance.

codes.name: Gateway Timeout
codes.description: The server did not receive a timely response from an upstream server.

codes.name: HTTP Version Not Supported
codes.description: The server does not support the HTTP version used in the request.

codes.name: Variant Also Negotiates
codes.description: The server has an internal configuration error related to content negotiation.

codes.name: Insufficient Storage
codes.description: The server cannot store the representation needed to complete the request.

codes.name: Loop Detected
codes.description: The server detected an infinite loop while processing the request.

codes.name: Not Extended
codes.description: Further extensions to the request are required.

codes.name: Network Authentication Required
codes.description: The client must authenticate to gain network access.
